subject: [CDS] Move CDS Blueprint to use strimzi kafka user template
commit_message:
[CDS] Move CDS Blueprint to use strimzi kafka user template

CDS Blueprint is to be moved to use strimzi kafka user template

Change-Id: Id168c30d73d33ba07909b607d1b40a331ec04f73
Signed-off-by: david.mcweeney <david.mcweeney@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1851
